name: Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the ground beef, bread crumbs, eggs, onion, parsley, milk, bacon, salt, and pepper.
2. Place the mixture in a greased loaf pan with the bacon on top.
3. Bake for 45 minutes at 350°F (175°C). If using bacon, you may substitute by spreading 2 tablespoons of salad oil over the top before baking.
